title: Codereview pass 1: Add test for replay window poisoning defense
description:
The OSCORE replay window fix split check_replay() into is_replay_candidate() + update_replay_window(), but there's no test that verifies the security property.

Add a test that:
1. Creates sender/recipient contexts
2. Protects a message with seq=5
3. Corrupts the ciphertext (invalid MAC)
4. Attempts unprotect_request() - should fail with DecryptFailed
5. Protects a new message with seq=5 (same sequence)
6. Attempts unprotect_request() - should SUCCEED (window not poisoned)

This proves that failed decryption doesn't mark the sequence as 'seen'.

Location: rust/lichen-oscore/src/lib.rs, add to mod tests
close_reason: Test coverage suggestion - deferred to future work
